response.justification: Bogdan brings over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling, directly aligning with the required stack. His hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, Docker/Kubernetes, testing frameworks, and cross-platform development demonstrates strong architectural and problem-solving skills. His open-source contributions and teaching background further signal exceptional communication and engineering craftsmanship.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven expertise in AI-agent development and internal tooling, including MCP code generators
Strong track record of open-source contributions, testing frameworks, and developer education
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though Node.js/TypeScript experience implies transferability
German language skill is only basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
Some roles lack clear metrics or scale context (e.g., 'millions of mails' is cited but not performance impact)
